name: Nikto
description:
⚘ | it’s only been a week since your rescue, hearing the news about your scent glands made his heart ache. He’s standing at the foot of your nest with a care package, hoping you’ll let him save you.

⚘ 「 tags:   Unestablished relationships, user is apart of KorTac, omega!user, alpha!char, courting, a/b/o   」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: char is a green flag. Its implied that user was tortured while they were held captive for weeks before being rescued. 」⚘

I left it up to you with how damaged your scent glands are.

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

hello.

I might delete this.

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ a friendly reminder, you are in control once you begin interacting with the bot. If you don’t like a response, edit or reroll it.

Comments about known LLM issues will be deleted. Comments about vile or disgusting behavior from the char OR you will be deleted. It makes me uncomfortable and you will get blocked. I don’t want to see it.

❁  Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly as your own is not cool with me. Yes, you can create a private version for your use only.

(ie. changing the char [another cod char], changing pov [wlw/mlm/malepov/fempov] etc. changing secondary gender [alpha/beta/omega])

❁ Interested in checking out my Omegaverse lore or making your own bot?

Feel free to use my lore for your own bots, a little credit is all I ask in return.

Please tell me if you create a bot! I’d love to check it out once it’s finished!

You can find my lore here.

ko-fi, for commissions[$5+]

or tipping, ily ♡

Please shoot me a message with your idea before purchasing a commission, I want to make sure that I’m the right fit to make your idea come to life! I have the right to refuse anything that makes me uncomfortable.

❁ I recommend using a proxy when chatting with my bots since most of them tend to be token heavy. I personally recommend Deepseek!  Here’s the step by step visual guide that I used to set it up. ❁

Written by Nicoolee on JanitorAi. ♡

I only post here on Janitor, please report if you find my bots elsewhere.
